attacking_style: Final kilometer aggression on decisive stages, willing to attack late but lacks finishing power to convert. Responds reactively to GC rival accelerations rather than initiating sustained long-range moves.
team_tactics: MovieStar provides TTT support but shows positioning discipline issues under pressure. Limited evidence of systematic climb domestique support; rider appears to operate independently in finale moments.
terrain_preference: Grand Tour stage racing with ability to respond on climbs to GC accelerations. Shows resilience across three-week efforts with capacity to recover from setbacks (crash recovery). No sprint specialization evident.
vulnerability: Lacks winning power in final moments despite strong positioning and form. TTT discipline and precision timing cost marginal gains. Cannot sustain or initiate decisive accelerations against top GC rivals.
key_patterns: Final kilometer attacks without conversion power: 2 documented late-race efforts unsuccessful
Strong recovery capacity: bounced back from Tour crash to sprint first at Vuelta
Reactive GC racing: matched ROGLIC accelerations but deficit grew to 2:00 overall
Consistent podium-adjacent results: strong form without top-step finishing ability across years
form_trajectory: neutral: 2021-2023 shows consistent strong form and recovery ability, but no breakthrough in converting positioning to victories. Maintains GC relevance without progression to winning tier.
